sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Click at current boundary (0, 42) to test if it converts 2 pixels
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 0, 'col': 42}])

# Check result
pink = [n for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'P']
if pink:
    print(f"Pink pixels after click: {pink[0]['pixels']}")
else:
    print("Pink bar gone!")
print(f"Level complete: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
